pr.title: fix: sync EmbedPDF PDFium engine assets
pr.body: ## Summary - Pin EmbedPDF packages to exact 2.14.3 versions so deploys cannot mix JS and WASM minor versions. - Replace the vendored `public/vendor/embedpdf/pdfium.wasm` with the matching 2.14.3 binary. ## Verification - `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` - `pnpm build` - Verified the required `EPDFDoc_GetPageObjectNumberByIndex` export exists in the vendored WASM. - Opened a generated PDF through the EmbedPDF PDFium engine using the vendored WASM. - Manually loaded the PDF viewer in Chrome, confirmed the PDF renders, console is clean, zoom works, and dark mode keeps the page visible. [pdf_viewer_engine_fixed.mp4](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-8aeddee8-5048-4a18-a5b7-de6c9f148008/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Fpdf_viewer_engine_fixed.mp4) [PDF viewer rendered in dark mode](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-8aeddee8-5048-4a18-a5b7-de6c9f148008/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Fpdf_viewer_dark_mode_rendered.webp) [PDF viewer console without engine assertion](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-8aeddee8-5048-4a18-a5b7-de6c9f148008/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Fpdf_viewer_console_clean.webp) To show artifacts inline, enable in settings.
pr.author: theg1239
